queries.question: For every scholarship, provide me its criteria
queries.sql: select scholarships.name , criteria.value from Scholarship_Criteria join Criteria on Scholarship_Criteria.criterion_id = Criteria.id join Scholarships on Scholarship_Criteria.scholarship_id = Scholarships.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?value WHERE {
  ?scholarship_criteria a :Scholarship_Criteria .
  ?criteria a :Criteria .
  ?scholarship_criteria p:hasCriteria ?criteria .
  ?scholarships a :Scholarships .
  ?scholarship_criteria p:hasScholarships ?scholarships .
  ?scholarships p:name ?name .
  ?criteria p:value ?value .
}

queries.question: Give me the criteria that are common to all scholarships
queries.sql: SELECT Criteria.value  from Scholarship_Criteria join Criteria on Scholarship_Criteria.criterion_id = Criteria.id join Scholarships on Scholarship_Criteria.scholarship_id = Scholarships.id   GROUP BY Scholarship_Criteria.criterion_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Scholarship_Criteria.scholarship_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Scholarships)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What criteria do we have for every scholarship?
